'''Kip''' was a [[Human/Legends|man]] who was in [[Vanster Enan's Sop House]] during the 200th anniversary celebrations in [[Gadrin]]. He was hitting on [[Amaya]] and [[Suki]], and hooked up with Amaya. He was greasy and had a thin mustache.

{{Char-stub}}
